channel.title: Digital pets on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Digital pets on Tech Tracker

item.title: Voidpet - befriend with digital pets spawned from your emotions.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-ISON7DAmll0/ZFKLwbikhJI/AAAAAAAAQ-A/NVvRL0iB9kkFXVz46NgcwZUofimoN9SnwCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1683131326435382-0.png" alt=""> Pets are basically living beings other then humans like animals, insects, etc which us humans when felt ownership get or buy them from someone or through stores afterwards if the owner have ethics and responsibilty then that person usually take care off them in home or anywhere else for personal or commercial purposes by providing them overall well being like roof I mean home to live with food and safety at the same making as well as showing bond to build trust and friendship even treat like a family member which will eventually give good and acceptable physical and mental environment for pets, isn’t that right?
